title: Fermionic semiclassical Lp estimates
summary:
We generalize the semiclassical Lp estimates of Koch, Tataru and Zworski in
the setting of Schr{\"o}dinger operators with confining potentials to density
matrices. This is motivated by the problem of the concentration of free
fermionic particles in a trapping potential. Our proof relies on semiclassical
and many-body tools. As an application, we provide bounds on spectral clusters.
We also discuss the optimality of the one-body and many-body bounds through
explicit examples of quasimodes.

AI.tldr: 将Koch-Tataru-Zworski的半经典Lp估计推广到具有约束势的薛定谔算子的密度矩阵情形，应用于自由费米子粒子在陷阱势中的浓度问题
AI.motivation: 研究自由费米子粒子在陷阱势中的浓度问题，需要将半经典分析中的Lp估计从波函数推广到密度矩阵，以处理多体量子系统
AI.techniques: 半经典分析工具、多体量子系统方法、拟模构造技术
AI.main_theorems: 将Koch-Tataru-Zworski的Lp估计推广到密度矩阵情形，获得谱簇的界，并通过拟模例子讨论单体和多体界的最优性
AI.significance: 为多体量子系统的浓度估计提供新工具，连接半经典分析与多体量子物理，对量子化学和凝聚态物理中的费米子系统有应用价值

title: Potential theory of Dirichlet forms with jump kernels blowing up at the   boundary
comment:
A few typos corrected, some references updated; Accepted in the
  Journal of Functional Analysis
summary:
In this paper we study the potential theory of Dirichlet forms on the
half-space $\mathbb{R}^d_+$ defined by the jump kernel
$J(x,y)=|x-y|^{-d-\alpha}\mathcal{B}(x,y)$ and the killing potential $\kappa
x_d^{-\alpha}$, where $\alpha\in (0, 2)$ and $\mathcal{B}(x,y)$ can blow up to
infinity at the boundary. The jump kernel and the killing potential depend on
several parameters. For all admissible values of the parameters involved and
all $d \ge 1$, we prove that the boundary Harnack principle holds, and
establish sharp two-sided estimates on the Green functions of these processes.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有边界奇异性跳核和杀死势的Dirichlet形式的边界Harnack原理和Green函数估计
AI.motivation: 研究半空间上具有边界奇异性的非局部Dirichlet形式的位势理论，其中跳核和杀死势在边界附近可能发散，这类问题在非局部算子理论中具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 使用Dirichlet形式理论、非局部算子分析、边界Harnack原理的证明方法、Green函数估计技术，处理边界奇异性问题
AI.main_theorems: 对所有参数和维度证明了边界Harnack原理成立，并建立了这些过程Green函数的精确双边估计
AI.significance: 扩展了非局部Dirichlet形式的位势理论，为具有边界奇异性的非局部算子提供了理论基础，在概率论、偏微分方程和数学物理中有重要应用

title: The concept of mapped coercivity for nonlinear operators in Banach   spaces
summary:
We provide a concise proof of existence for nonlinear operator equations in
separable Banach spaces. Notably, the operator is not assumed to be monotone.
Instead, our main hypotheses consist of a continuity assumption and a
generalized coercivity property. Mapped coercivity is a generalization of the
usual coercivity property for nonlinear operators. In the case of linear
operators, we recover linear coercivity and the traditional inf-sup condition.
To illustrate the applicability of this general concept, we apply it to
semi-linear elliptic problems and the Navier-Stokes equations.

AI.tldr: 提出了在可分Banach空间中非线性算子方程存在性的简洁证明，不要求算子单调性，仅需连续性和广义强制性条件
AI.motivation: 研究非线性算子方程的存在性问题，传统方法通常要求算子具有单调性，但许多重要应用中的算子并不满足这一条件。本文旨在放宽这一限制，仅基于连续性和广义强制性条件建立存在性理论。
AI.techniques: 使用映射强制性(mapped coercivity)作为核心分析工具，这是传统强制性条件的推广；在可分Banach空间中应用泛函分析方法；通过连续性假设和广义强制性条件构造证明框架。
AI.main_theorems: 在可分Banach空间中建立了非线性算子方程的存在性定理，主要假设为：1) 算子连续性；2) 映射强制性条件。特别地，对于线性算子，该条件退化为线性强制性和传统的inf-sup条件。
AI.significance: 扩展了非线性算子方程的存在性理论，不再需要单调性假设，使得理论可应用于更广泛的偏微分方程问题；通过半线性椭圆问题和Navier-Stokes方程展示了该框架的实际应用价值。

title: Uncertainty Principle and Geometric Condition for the Observability of   Schr\"{o}dinger Equations
summary:
We provide necessary and sufficient geometric conditions for the exact
observability of the Schr\"odinger equation with inverse-square potentials on
the half-line. These conditions are derived from a Logvinenko-Sereda type
theorem for generalized Fourier transform. Specifically, the generalized
Fourier transform associated with the Schr\"odinger operator with
inverse-square potentials on the half-line is the well-known Hankel transform.
We present a necessary and sufficient condition for a subset $\Omega$, such
that a function whose Hankel transform is supported in a given interval can be
bounded, in the $L^2$-norm, from above by its restriction to $\Omega$, with a
constant independent of the position of the interval.

AI.tldr: 建立了带有逆平方势的薛定谔方程在实半轴上精确可观性的充要几何条件
AI.motivation: 研究带有逆平方势的薛定谔方程的可观性问题，这类方程在量子力学和数学物理中具有重要意义，特别是其谱理论和控制性质
AI.techniques: 使用广义傅里叶变换（具体为Hankel变换）和Logvinenko-Sereda型定理，建立频率局部化函数在子集上的L²范数控制
AI.main_theorems: 给出了子集Ω使得Hankel变换支撑在给定区间上的函数能被其在Ω上的限制控制的充要条件，并由此得到薛定谔方程精确可观性的几何判据
AI.significance: 为带有奇异势的薛定谔方程的控制理论提供了严格的数学基础，建立了可观性与几何条件之间的精确对应关系

title: On the regularity problem for parabolic operators and the role of   half-time derivative
comment: final revision, accepted to a journal (JGA)
summary:
In this paper we present the following result on regularity of solutions of
the second order parabolic equation $\partial_t u - \mbox{div} (A \nabla
u)+B\cdot \nabla u=0$ on cylindrical domains of the form $\Omega=\mathcal
O\times\mathbb R$ where $\mathcal O\subset\mathbb R^n$ is a is a uniform domain
(it satisfies both interior corkscrew and Harnack chain conditions) and has a
boundary that is $n-1$-Ahlfors regular. Let $u$ be a solution of such PDE in
$\Omega$ and the non-tangential maximal function of its gradient in spatial
directions $\tilde{N}(\nabla u)$ belongs to $L^p(\partial\Omega)$ for some
$p>1$. Furthermore, assume that for $u|_{\partial\Omega}=f$ we have that
$D^{1/2}_tf\in L^p(\partial\Omega)$. Then both $\tilde{N}(D^{1/2}_t u)$ and
$\tilde{N}(D^{1/2}_tH_t u)$ also belong to $L^p(\partial\Omega)$, where
$D^{1/2}_t$ and $H_t$ are the half-derivative and the Hilbert transform in the
time variable, respectively. We expect this result will spur new developments
in the study of solvability of the $L^p$ parabolic Regularity problem as thanks
to it it is now possible to formulate the parabolic Regularity problem on a
large class of time-varying domains.

AI.tldr: 建立了抛物型方程在柱形域上解的时空正则性结果，为非时变域上的抛物正则性问题的推广提供了关键工具。
AI.motivation: 研究二阶抛物方程在柱形域上的正则性问题，特别是当空间方向梯度非切向极大函数属于L^p边界空间时，时间方向的半导数和希尔伯特变换的正则性，为抛物正则性问题的推广到时变域奠定基础。
AI.techniques: 使用非切向极大函数、时间方向的半导数算子、希尔伯特变换、均匀域理论、Ahlfors正则边界、抛物方程的正则性理论。
AI.main_theorems: 在柱形域Ω=O×R上，若抛物方程解的空间梯度非切向极大函数属于L^p(∂Ω)，且边界值的半导数也属于L^p，则时间半导数的非切向极大函数和希尔伯特变换的非切向极大函数同样属于L^p空间。
AI.significance: 为抛物正则性问题的L^p可解性研究提供了关键工具，使得抛物正则性问题能够在大类时变域上表述和求解，推动了抛物边界值问题理论的发展。

title: Leapfrogging vortex rings as scaling limit of Euler Equations
comment: 33 pages, 1 figure; typos corrected, references updated
summary:
We consider an incompressible fluid with axial symmetry without swirl,
assuming initial data such that the initial vorticity is very concentrated
inside $N$ small disjoint rings of thickness $\varepsilon$, each one of
vorticity mass and main radius of order $|\log\varepsilon|$. When $\varepsilon
\to 0$, we show that, at least for small but positive times, the motion of the
rings converges to a dynamical system firstly introduced in [NoDEA Nonlinear
Diff. Eq. Appl. 6 (1999), 473-499]. In the special case of two vortex rings
with large enough main radius, the result is improved reaching longer times, in
such a way to cover the case of several overtakings between the rings, thus
providing a mathematical rigorous derivation of the leapfrogging phenomenon.

AI.tldr: 建立了轴向对称无旋涡流体中多个涡环的数学理论，严格推导了涡环的跳跃现象
AI.motivation: 研究轴向对称无旋涡流体中多个涡环的动力学行为，特别是当涡环厚度趋于零时，涡环运动的极限行为，旨在为涡环跳跃现象提供严格的数学推导
AI.techniques: 使用涡度集中极限方法，结合轴向对称无旋涡流体的特殊结构，分析涡环厚度趋于零时的渐近行为，建立与离散动力系统的联系
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当涡环厚度ε→0时，涡环运动收敛到特定的动力系统；对于两个足够大半径的涡环，结果可扩展到更长的时间尺度，从而严格推导出涡环跳跃现象
AI.significance: 为涡环动力学提供了严格的数学基础，首次从数学上证明了涡环跳跃现象，连接了连续流体力学与离散涡环动力系统，对理解涡环相互作用有重要理论意义

title: Multilevel Picard approximations overcome the curse of dimensionality in   the numerical approximation of general semilinear PDEs with   gradient-dependent nonlinearities
summary:
Neufeld and Wu (arXiv:2310.12545) developed a multilevel Picard (MLP)
algorithm which can approximately solve general semilinear parabolic PDEs with
gradient-dependent nonlinearities, allowing also for coefficient functions of
the corresponding PDE to be non-constant. By introducing a particular
stochastic fixed-point equation (SFPE) motivated by the Feynman-Kac
representation and the Bismut-Elworthy-Li formula and identifying the first and
second component of the unique fixed-point of the SFPE with the unique
viscosity solution of the PDE and its gradient, they proved convergence of
their algorithm. However, it remained an open question whether the proposed MLP
schema in arXiv:2310.12545 does not suffer from the curse of dimensionality. In
this paper, we prove that the MLP algorithm in arXiv:2310.12545 indeed can
overcome the curse of dimensionality, i.e. that its computational complexity
only grows polynomially in the dimension $d\in \mathbb{N}$ and the reciprocal
of the accuracy $\varepsilon$, under some suitable assumptions on the nonlinear
part of the corresponding PDE.

AI.tldr: 证明了Neufeld和Wu提出的多级Picard算法能够克服维度灾难，计算复杂度仅随维度d和精度ε的倒数多项式增长。
AI.motivation: Neufeld和Wu提出的MLP算法能近似求解具有梯度依赖非线性的半线性抛物型PDE，但原论文未证明该算法是否受维度灾难影响，本文旨在解决这一开放性问题。
AI.techniques: 基于随机不动点方程(SFPE)框架，结合Feynman-Kac表示和Bismut-Elworthy-Li公式，分析多级Picard算法的计算复杂度。
AI.main_theorems: 在PDE非线性部分的适当假设下，证明了MLP算法的计算复杂度仅随维度d和精度ε的倒数多项式增长，从而克服了维度灾难。
AI.significance: 为高维半线性抛物型PDE的数值求解提供了理论保证，证明了MLP算法在高维情形下的可行性，对金融数学、物理等领域的应用具有重要意义。

title: From particle systems to the stochastic compressible Navier-Stokes   equations of a barotropic fluid
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2301.08101
summary:
We propose a mathematical derivation of stochastic compressible Navier-Stokes
equation. We consider many-particle systems with a Hamiltonian dynamics
supplemented by a friction term and environmental noise. Both the interaction
potential and the additional friction force are supposed to be long range in
comparison with the typical distance between neighboring particles. It is shown
that the empirical measures associated to the position and velocity of the
system converge to the solutions of the stochastic compressible Navier-Stokes
equations of a barotropic fluid. Moreover, we quantify the distance between
particles and the limit in suitable in Besov and Triebel-Lizorkin spaces.

AI.tldr: 从具有摩擦和噪声的哈密顿多粒子系统推导出随机可压缩Navier-Stokes方程
AI.motivation: 研究如何从微观粒子系统的统计力学出发，推导出宏观的随机可压缩Navier-Stokes方程，建立微观与宏观之间的联系
AI.techniques: 使用经验测度收敛、长程相互作用势、摩擦力和环境噪声的统计力学方法，以及在Besov和Triebel-Lizorkin空间中的量化估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了多粒子系统的经验测度收敛到随机可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的解，并在Besov和Triebel-Lizorkin空间中量化了粒子与极限之间的距离
AI.significance: 为随机流体力学提供了微观基础，建立了统计力学与随机PDE之间的联系，对理解湍流等复杂流体现象有重要意义

title: Degenerate Kirchhoff problems with nonlinear Neumann boundary condition
summary:
In this paper we consider degenerate Kirchhoff-type equations of the form
\[-\phi(\Xi(u)) \left(\mathcal{A}(u)-|u|^{p-2}u\right) = f(x,u)\quad \text{in }
\Omega,\] \[\phantom{aaiaaaaaaaaa}\phi (\Xi(u)) \mathcal{B}(u) \cdot \nu =
g(x,u) \quad \text{on } \partial\Omega,\] where $\Omega\subseteq \mathbb{R}^N$,
$N\geq 2$, is a bounded domain with Lipschitz boundary $\partial\Omega$,
$\mathcal{A}$ denotes the double phase operator given by \begin{align*}
\mathcal{A}(u)=\operatorname{div} \left(|\nabla u|^{p-2}\nabla u + \mu(x)
|\nabla u|^{q-2}\nabla u \right)\quad \text{for }u\in
W^{1,\mathcal{H}}(\Omega), \end{align*} $\nu(x)$ is the outer unit normal of
$\Omega$ at $x \in \partial\Omega$, \[\mathcal{B}(u)=|\nabla u|^{p-2}\nabla u +
\mu(x) |\nabla u|^{q-2}\nabla u,\] \[\phantom{aaaiaaaa}\Xi(u)= \int_\Omega
\left(\frac{|\nabla u|^p+|u|^p}{p}+\mu(x) \frac{|\nabla
u|^q}{q}\right)\,\mathrm{d} x,\] $1<p<N$, $p<q<p^*=\frac{Np}{N-p}$, $0 \leq
\mu(\cdot)\in L^\infty(\Omega)$, $\phi(s) = a + b s^{\zeta-1}$ for
$s\in\mathbb{R}$ with $a \geq 0$, $b>0$ and $\zeta \geq 1$, and
$f\colon\Omega\times\mathbb{R}\to\mathbb{R}$,
$g\colon\partial\Omega\times\mathbb{R}\to\mathbb{R}$ are Carath\'{e}odory
functions that grow superlinearly and subcritically. We prove the existence of
a nodal ground state solution to the problem above, based on variational
methods and minimization of the associated energy functional $\mathcal{E}\colon
W^{1,\mathcal{H}}(\Omega) \to\mathbb{R}$ over the constraint set
\[\mathcal{C}=\Big\{u \in W^{1,\mathcal{H}}(\Omega)\colon u^{\pm}\neq 0,\,
\left\langle \mathcal{E}'(u),u^+ \right\rangle= \left\langle
\mathcal{E}'(u),-u^- \right\rangle=0 \Big\},\] whereby $\mathcal{C}$ differs
from the well-known nodal Nehari manifold due to the nonlocal character of the
problem.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有双相算子的退化Kirchhoff型方程存在节点基态解
AI.motivation: 研究具有双相算子的退化Kirchhoff型方程，这类方程结合了非局部Kirchhoff项和双相算子，在数学物理中有重要应用，特别是处理具有不同增长阶的非线性问题
AI.techniques: 变分方法、能量泛函最小化、约束集上的临界点理论、双相空间W^{1,ℋ}(Ω)的分析、Nehari流形的推广
AI.main_theorems: 证明了上述退化Kirchhoff型方程存在节点基态解，通过最小化约束集𝒞上的能量泛函ℰ获得，其中𝒞是经典Nehari节点流形的推广
AI.significance: 将Kirchhoff型方程的研究扩展到双相算子情形，建立了非局部问题节点解的存在性理论，为处理具有不同增长阶的非线性问题提供了新方法

title: Hardy and Rellich identities and inequalities for Baouendi-Grushin   operators via spherical vector fields
comment:
This is the updated version of the paper, which has a slightly
  different title and a revised introduction. 41 pages
summary:
For Baouendi-Grushin vector fields, we prove Hardy, Hardy-Rellich, and
Rellich identities and inequalities with sharp constants. Our explicit
remainder terms significantly improve than those found in the literature. Our
arguments are built on abstract Hardy-Rellich identities involving the Bessel
pair along with the use of spherical harmonics developed by Garofalo-Shen [Ann.
Inst. Fourier (1994)]. Furthermore, in the spirit of Bez-Machihara-Ozawa [Math.
Z (2023)], we construct spherical vector fields corresponding to the
Baouendi-Grushin vector fields and prove identities that, in turn, establish
optimal Rellich identities, by comparing the Baouendi-Grushin operator with its
radial and spherical components. We give alternate proofs of Hardy identities
and inequalities with enhanced Hardy constants in some subspaces of the Sobolev
space, among other things. Additionally, we compute the deficit involving the
$L^2$-norm of the Baouendi-Grushin operator and its radial component with an
explicit remainder term, which leads to a comparison of the Baouendi-Grushin
operator with its radial components. As a consequence of the main results, new
second-order Heisenberg-Pauli-Weyl uncertainty principles and Hydrogen
uncertainty principles are also derived. Furthermore, we also derive certain
symmetrization principles green corresponding to the Baouendi-Grushin vector
fields.

AI.tldr: 证明了Baouendi-Grushin向量场的Hardy、Hardy-Rellich和Rellich恒等式与不等式，获得了带精确常数和显式余项的改进结果。
AI.motivation: 研究Baouendi-Grushin向量场相关的Hardy型不等式，改进现有文献中的余项估计，建立更精确的恒等式和不等式。
AI.techniques: 利用Bessel对的抽象Hardy-Rellich恒等式、球谐函数方法、构造球面向量场、比较Baouendi-Grushin算子与其径向和球面分量。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了带精确常数的Hardy、Hardy-Rellich和Rellich恒等式与不等式；证明了Sobolev空间子空间中增强的Hardy常数；计算了Baouendi-Grushin算子与其径向分量L²范数的亏量。
AI.significance: 显著改进了Baouendi-Grushin向量场不等式理论，推导了新的二阶Heisenberg-Pauli-Weyl不确定原理和氢原子不确定原理，建立了对称化原理。

title: Dynamics of Elastic Wires: Preserving Area without Nonlocality
comment: 32 pages, 2 figures. Final version. Comments are welcome!
summary:
We derive an $H^{-1}$-gradient flow of the elastic energy which preserves the
enclosed area of evolving planar curves. For this new sixth-order evolution
equation, we prove a global existence result. Additionally, by penalizing the
length, we show convergence to an area constrained critical point of the
elastic energy.

AI.tldr: 提出并分析了一个保持面积不变的六阶弹性能量梯度流方程
AI.motivation: 研究平面曲线的弹性能量极小化问题，需要保持曲线所围面积不变，这在实际应用中很重要（如材料科学中的相变、生物膜形态等）
AI.techniques: 使用H^{-1}梯度流方法构造保持面积的演化方程，通过惩罚长度项处理约束，采用能量方法和抛物型PDE理论进行全局存在性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了新六阶演化方程的全局存在性；2. 通过长度惩罚项证明了演化收敛到面积约束下弹性能量的临界点
AI.significance: 为几何变分问题提供了新的分析框架，将面积约束自然地融入梯度流结构，在材料科学和生物物理中有潜在应用价值

title: Finite time blow-up for a nonlinear parabolic equation with smooth   coefficients
summary:
In this article, we consider an n-dimensional parabolic partial differential
equation with a smooth coefficient term in the nonlinear gradient term. This
equation was first introduced and analyzed in [E. Issoglio, On a non-linear
transport-diffusion equation with distributional coefficients, Journal of
Differential Equations, Volume 267, Issue 10 (2019)], where one of the main
open questions is the possible finite-time blow-up of solutions. Here,
leveraging a virial-type estimate, we provide a positive answer to this
question within the framework of smooth solutions.

AI.tldr: 证明了n维抛物型偏微分方程在非线性梯度项具有光滑系数时，光滑解存在有限时间爆破
AI.motivation: 研究Issoglio在2019年提出的非线性输运-扩散方程，该方程具有分布系数，其中一个主要开放问题是解是否会发生有限时间爆破
AI.techniques: 使用virial型估计方法，在光滑解框架下进行分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了该方程的光滑解会发生有限时间爆破，正面回答了Issoglio提出的开放性问题
AI.significance: 解决了该方程解行为的关键理论问题，为理解此类非线性抛物型方程的解的奇异性提供了重要结果

title: Rods in flows: the PDE theory of immersed elastic filaments
summary:
We investigate a family of curve evolution equations approximating the motion
of a Kirchhoff rod immersed in a low Reynolds number fluid. The rod is modeled
as a framed curve whose energy consists of the bending energy of the curve and
the twisting energy of the frame. The equations we consider may be realized as
gradient flows of the rod energy under a certain anisotropic metric coming from
resistive force theory. Ultimately, our goal is to provide a comprehensive
treatment of the PDE theory of immersed rod dynamics. We begin by analyzing the
problem without the frame, in which case the evolution is globally well-posed
and solutions asymptotically converge to Euler elasticae. Next, in the planar
setting, we demonstrate the existence of large time-periodic solutions forced
by intrinsic curvature relevant to undulatory swimming. Finally, the majority
of the paper is devoted to the evolution of an immersed Kirchhoff rod in 3D,
which involves a strong coupling between the curve and frame. Under a
physically reasonable assumption on the curvature, solutions exist
globally-in-time and asymptotically converge to rod equilibria.

AI.tldr: 建立了浸入低雷诺数流体中Kirchhoff杆的曲线演化方程PDE理论，证明了全局适定性和渐近收敛性。
AI.motivation: 研究浸入低雷诺数流体中的Kirchhoff杆动力学，该杆由带框架的曲线建模，能量包含弯曲能和扭转能，旨在建立完整的PDE理论框架。
AI.techniques: 使用梯度流方法、各向异性度量（来自阻力理论）、能量估计、全局适定性分析、渐近收敛性证明、大时间周期解构造。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 无框架情形：演化全局适定，解渐近收敛到Euler弹性曲线；2. 平面情形：存在由内在曲率驱动的大时间周期解（与波动游泳相关）；3. 三维情形：在物理合理的曲率假设下，解全局存在且渐近收敛到杆平衡态。
AI.significance: 为浸入粘性流体中的弹性杆动力学提供了严格的PDE理论框架，连接了弹性力学、低雷诺数流体力学和生物游泳运动，具有理论和应用价值。

title: Bifurcations of unstable eigenvalues for Stokes waves derived from   conserved energy
summary:
We address Euler's equations for irrotational gravity waves in an infinitely
deep fluid rewritten in conformal variables. Stokes waves are traveling waves
with the smooth periodic profile. In agreement with the previous numerical
results, we give a rigorous proof that the zero eigenvalue bifurcation in the
linearized equations of motion for co-periodic perturbations occurs at each
extremal point of the energy function versus the steepness parameter, provided
that the wave speed is not extremal at the same steepness. We derive the normal
form for the unstable eigenvalues and, assisted with numerical approximation of
its coefficients, we show that the new unstable eigenvalues emerge only in the
direction of increasing steepness.

AI.tldr: 严格证明了Stokes波在能量函数极值点处发生零特征值分岔，并推导了不稳定特征值的规范形式
AI.motivation: 研究无限深流体中无旋重力波的Euler方程，分析Stokes波（光滑周期剖面行波）的稳定性分岔问题，验证先前数值结果的严格数学证明
AI.techniques: 使用共形变量重写Euler方程，线性化运动方程分析同周期扰动，推导零特征值分岔的规范形式，结合数值近似计算系数
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在能量函数相对于陡度参数的每个极值点处，只要波速在同一陡度处不是极值，就会发生零特征值分岔；2. 推导了不稳定特征值的规范形式；3. 证明新的不稳定特征值仅在陡度增加方向上出现
AI.significance: 为Stokes波的稳定性分岔提供了严格数学证明，验证了先前数值结果，深化了对重力波稳定性机制的理解，对流体动力学稳定性理论有重要贡献

title: Closed BV-extension and $W^{1,1}$-extension sets
summary:
This paper studies the relations between extendability of different classes
of Sobolev $W^{1,1}$ and $BV$ functions from closed sets in general metric
measure spaces. Under the assumption that the metric measure space satisfies a
weak $(1,1)$-Poincar\'e inequality and measure doubling, we prove further
properties for the extension sets. In the case of the Euclidean plane, we show
that compact finitely connected $BV$-extension sets are always also
$W^{1,1}$-extension sets. This is shown via a local quasiconvexity result for
the complement of the extension set.

AI.tldr: 在满足弱(1,1)-Poincaré不等式和加倍测度的度量测度空间中，研究了Sobolev W^{1,1}和BV函数从闭集的可延拓性关系，并在欧氏平面中证明了紧有限连通BV延拓集总是W^{1,1}延拓集。
AI.motivation: 研究一般度量测度空间中Sobolev空间W^{1,1}和有界变差(BV)函数从闭集的可延拓性问题，探索这两类函数延拓性质之间的关系，特别关注在欧氏平面等具体空间中的特殊性质。
AI.techniques: 利用度量测度空间理论，特别是弱(1,1)-Poincaré不等式和测度加倍条件；通过分析延拓集的补集的局部拟凸性来建立延拓性质；在欧氏平面情形采用几何分析方法。
AI.main_theorems: 在满足弱(1,1)-Poincaré不等式和测度加倍的度量测度空间中，证明了延拓集的进一步性质；在欧氏平面中，证明了紧有限连通BV延拓集总是W^{1,1}延拓集。
AI.significance: 深化了对Sobolev空间和BV函数延拓理论的理解，建立了不同函数类延拓性质之间的联系，为度量测度空间中的函数延拓理论提供了新结果，在几何测度论和偏微分方程理论中有潜在应用。

title: Kinks of fractional $\phi^4$ models: existence, uniqueness,   monotonicity, stability, and sharp asymptotics
summary:
In the present work we construct kink solutions for different (parabolic and
wave) variants of the fractional $\phi^4$ model, in both the sub-Laplacian and
super-Laplacian setting. We establish existence and monotonicity results (for
the sub - Laplacian case), along with sharp asymptotics which are corroborated
through numerical computations. Importantly, in the sub-Laplacian regime, we
provide the explicit and numerically verifiable spectral condition, which
guarantees uniqueness for odd kinks. We check numerically the relevant
condition to confirm the uniqueness of such solutions. In addition, we show
asymptotic stability for the stationary kinks in the parabolic setting and
also, the spectral stability for the traveling kinks in the corresponding wave
equation.

AI.tldr: 构造分数阶φ⁴模型的各种变体中的扭结解，并研究其存在性、单调性、渐近行为及稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶φ⁴模型中的扭结解，该模型在相变理论、场论和凝聚态物理中有重要应用，特别是在分数阶微积分框架下探索非线性波现象
AI.techniques: 分数阶微积分方法、变分原理、谱分析、数值计算验证、渐近展开分析、稳定性理论
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在次拉普拉斯和超拉普拉斯设置下构造扭结解；2. 证明次拉普拉斯情况下解的存在性和单调性；3. 给出尖锐的渐近行为；4. 提供保证奇扭结解唯一性的显式谱条件；5. 证明抛物型设置下静态扭结的渐近稳定性和波动方程中行波扭结的谱稳定性
AI.significance: 扩展了分数阶非线性场论的研究，为分数阶偏微分方程中的孤子理论提供了新结果，对理解分数阶系统中的相变和非线性波传播有重要意义

title: Structural stability of cylindrical supersonic solutions to the steady   Euler-Poisson system
summary:
This paper concerns the structural stability of smooth cylindrically
symmetric supersonic Euler-Poisson flows in nozzles. Both three-dimensional and
axisymmetric perturbations are considered. On one hand, we establish the
existence and uniqueness of three-dimensional smooth supersonic solutions to
the potential flow model of the steady Euler-Poisson system. On the other hand,
the existence and uniqueness of smooth supersonic flows with nonzero vorticity
to the steady axisymmetric Euler-Poisson system are proved. The problem is
reduced to solve a nonlinear boundary value problem for a hyperbolic-elliptic
mixed system. One of the key ingredients in the analysis of three-dimensional
supersonic irrotational flows is the well-posedness theory for a linear second
order hyperbolic-elliptic coupled system, which is achieved by using the
multiplier method and the reflection technique to derive the energy estimates.
For smooth axisymmetric supersonic flows with nonzero vorticity, the
deformation-curl-Poisson decomposition is utilized to reformulate the steady
axisymmetric Euler-Poisson system as a deformation-curl-Poisson system together
with several transport equations, so that one can design a two-layer iteration
scheme to establish the nonlinear structural stability of the background
supersonic flow within the class of axisymmetric rotational flows.

AI.tldr: 建立了圆柱对称超音速欧拉-泊松流在喷管中的结构稳定性理论，分别处理了三维无旋流和轴对称有旋流两种情况。
AI.motivation: 研究等离子体物理和半导体器件中的超音速欧拉-泊松流的结构稳定性问题，特别是在喷管几何中的圆柱对称流动。该问题涉及带电粒子在电磁场中的运动，具有重要的物理应用背景。
AI.techniques: 1. 对三维无旋流：使用乘子法和反射技术推导能量估计，建立线性二阶双曲-椭圆耦合系统的适定性理论；2. 对轴对称有旋流：采用变形-旋度-泊松分解将系统重构为变形-旋度-泊松系统及多个输运方程，设计双层迭代格式。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了三维光滑超音速势流解的存在唯一性；2. 证明了具有非零涡量的轴对称光滑超音速流解的存在唯一性；3. 建立了背景超音速流在轴对称旋转流类中的非线性结构稳定性。
AI.significance: 为等离子体物理和半导体器件中的带电粒子输运问题提供了严格数学基础，发展了处理双曲-椭圆混合系统的分析方法，对理解带电流体在约束几何中的稳定性有重要理论价值。

title: Solutions with prescribed mass for $L^2$-supercritical NLS equations   under Neumann boundary conditions
comment: To appear in Proc. Roy. Soc. Edinburgh Sect. A 2025
summary:
In this paper, we investigate the following nonlinear Schr\"odinger equation
with Neumann boundary conditions: \begin{equation*} \begin{cases} -\Delta u+
\lambda u= f(u) & {\rm in} \,~ \Omega,\\ \displaystyle\frac{\partial
u}{\partial \nu}=0 \, &{\rm on}\,~\partial \Omega \end{cases} \end{equation*}
coupled with a constraint condition: \begin{equation*} \int_{\Omega}|u|^2 dx=c,
\end{equation*} where $\Omega\subset \mathbb{R}^N(N\ge3)$ denotes a smooth
bounded domain, $\nu$ represents the unit outer normal vector to $\partial
\Omega$, $c$ is a positive constant, and $\lambda$ acts as a Lagrange
multiplier. When the nonlinearity $f$ exhibits a general mass supercritical
growth at infinity, we establish the existence of normalized solutions, which
are not necessarily positive solutions and can be characterized as mountain
pass type critical points of the associated constraint functional. Our approach
provides a uniform treatment of various nonlinearities, including cases such as
$f(u)=|u|^{p-2}u$, $|u|^{q-2}u+ |u|^{p-2}u$, and $-|u|^{q-2}u+|u|^{p-2}u$,
where $2<q<2+\frac{4}{N}<p< 2^*$. The result is obtained through a combination
of a minimax principle with Morse index information for constrained functionals
and a novel blow-up analysis for the NLS equation under Neumann boundary
conditions.

AI.tldr: 建立了带Neumann边界条件的非线性Schrödinger方程在质量超临界增长下的规范化解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究带Neumann边界条件的非线性Schrödinger方程的规范化解问题，这类问题在物理中描述受限量子系统中的波函数，质量约束条件对应粒子数守恒，Neumann边界条件对应零通量边界
AI.techniques: 结合极小极大原理与约束泛函的Morse指数信息，以及Neumann边界条件下NLS方程的新颖爆破分析
AI.main_theorems: 当非线性项f在无穷远处具有一般质量超临界增长时，建立了规范化解的存在性，这些解不一定是正解，可以刻画为相关约束泛函的山路型临界点
AI.significance: 提供了处理各种非线性项的统一框架，包括纯幂次、和式与差式非线性项，扩展了Neumann边界条件下NLS方程的理论，为研究受限量子系统提供了数学基础

title: Standing waves with prescribed mass for NLS equations with Hardy   potential in the half-space under Neumman boundary condition
summary:
Consider the Neumann problem: \begin{eqnarray*} \begin{cases}
  &-\Delta u-\frac{\mu}{|x|^2}u +\lambda u =|u|^{q-2}u+|u|^{p-2}u
~~~\mbox{in}~~\mathbb{R}_+^N,~N\ge3,
  &\frac{\partial u}{\partial \nu}=0 ~~ \mbox{on}~~ \partial\mathbb{R}_+^N
\end{cases} \end{eqnarray*} with the prescribed mass:
  \begin{equation*}
  \int_{\mathbb{R}_+^N}|u|^2 dx=a>0,
  \end{equation*} where $\mathbb{R}_+^N$ denotes the upper half-space in
$\mathbb{R}^N$, $\frac{1}{|x|^2}$ is the Hardy potential,
$2<q<2+\frac{4}{N}<p<2^*$, $\mu>0$, $\nu$ stands for the outward unit normal
vector to $\partial \mathbb{R}_+^N$, and $\lambda$ appears as a Lagrange
multiplier. Firstly, by applying Ekeland's variational principle, we establish
the existence of normalized solutions that correspond to local minima of the
associated energy functional. Furthermore, we find a second normalized solution
of mountain pass type by employing a parameterized minimax principle that
incorporates Morse index information. Our analysis relies on a Hardy inequality
in $H^1(\mathbb{R}_+^N)$, as well as a Pohozaev identity involving the Hardy
potential on $\mathbb{R}_+^N$. This work provides a variational framework for
investigating the existence of normalized solutions to the Hardy type system
within a half-space, and our approach is flexible, allowing it to be adapted to
handle more general nonlinearities.

AI.tldr: 在半空间上带有Hardy势的Neumann问题中，建立了两种类型的归一化解：局部极小解和山路型解
AI.motivation: 研究半空间上带有Hardy势的Neumann边值问题的归一化解存在性，这类问题在量子力学和相对论量子力学中有重要应用，特别是涉及奇异势和半空间几何的情形
AI.techniques: Ekeland变分原理、参数化极小极大原理（含Morse指数信息）、Hardy不等式、Pohozaev恒等式、变分框架
AI.main_theorems: 1. 通过Ekeland变分原理证明对应能量泛函局部极小的归一化解存在性；2. 利用参数化极小极大原理证明山路型第二归一化解的存在性
AI.significance: 为半空间上Hardy型系统的归一化解研究提供了变分框架，方法具有灵活性，可推广到更一般的非线性项，对奇异势问题和半空间几何中的量子力学模型有理论意义

title: Representation of Global Viscosity Solutions for Tonelli Hamiltonians
summary:
We consider the Lax-Oleinik operator $\mathcal{T}$ associated with the
non-stationary Hamilton-Jacobi equation $\partial_tu + H(t,x,\partial_xu) =
\alpha_0$ for a Tonelli Hamiltonian $H$ and its \Mane critical value
$\alpha_0$. It is known from the work of A. Fathi and J.N. Mather
\cite{MR1792479} that the convergence of this semigroup fails in the
non-autonomous framework.
  In this context, we study the action of $\mathcal{T}$ on its non-wandering
set $\Omega(\mathcal{T})$. First, we show that $\mathcal{T}$ acts as an
isometry on this set, and then we characterize $\Omega(\mathcal{T})$ as the set
of global viscosity solutions of the Hamilton-Jacobi equation, i.e. solutions
that are defined for all real times.
  Next, we introduce a generalized Peierls barrier $\underline{k}$ and a set of
generalized static classes $\underline{\mathbb{M}}$ within the Mather set.
Using these, we represent elements $u$ of $\Omega(\mathcal{T})$ as
  \begin{equation*}
  u(x) = \inf_{y \in \underline{\mathbb{M}}} \{ u(y) + \underline{k}(y,x) \}
  \end{equation*}
  We apply this representation formula to prove Fathi's convergence theorem for
autonomous systems and provide a representation formula for $n$-periodic
viscosity solutions. Additionally, we establish that the dynamics of
non-wandering viscosity solutions are governed by the Lagrangian flow on the
Mather set. Specifically, we show that if the Mather set consists solely of
$N$-periodic orbits for some integer $N$, then all non-wandering viscosity
solutions are $N$-periodic. Furthermore, we show that if the restriction of the
Lagrangian flow to the Mather set is uniformly recurrent for a time sequence
$p_n$, then all non-wandering viscosity solutions are uniformly recurrent for
the same time sequence $p_n$.

AI.tldr: 研究了非自治Hamilton-Jacobi方程Lax-Oleinik算子在非游荡集上的等距作用，并建立了全局粘性解与Mather集上广义Peierls障碍的表示公式
AI.motivation: 研究非自治Tonelli Hamilton-Jacobi方程中Lax-Oleinik算子的收敛性问题。已知在非自治框架下该半群的收敛性失效，因此转向研究算子在非游荡集上的行为，旨在理解全局粘性解的结构和动力学性质。
AI.techniques: 使用Lax-Oleinik算子理论、Mather理论、粘性解方法，引入广义Peierls障碍和广义静态类，分析非游荡集上的等距性质，建立表示公式并研究解的周期性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. Lax-Oleinik算子在非游荡集上作为等距算子作用；2. 非游荡集等于全局粘性解集合；3. 建立全局粘性解通过广义Peierls障碍和广义静态类的表示公式；4. 证明当Mather集仅含N-周期轨道时，所有非游荡粘性解都是N-周期的；5. 若Mather集上拉格朗日流对时间序列p_n一致回复，则所有非游荡粘性解也对p_n一致回复。
AI.significance: 深化了对非自治Hamilton-Jacobi方程全局解结构的理解，建立了粘性解与Mather理论之间的深刻联系，为研究非自治系统的动力学行为提供了新工具，并推广了Fathi收敛定理到更一般情形。

title: An Orlicz space approach to exponential elliptic problems in higher   dimensions
summary:
We consider semilinear elliptic problems of the form \[ -\Delta u + \lambda u
= f(x,u), \quad u\in H^1_0(A), \] where $A\subset\mathbb{R}^N$, $N\geq3$, is
either a bounded or unbounded annulus, and $\lambda \geq0$. We study a broad
class of nonlinearities $f$ with superlinear growth at infinity, including
exponential- and power-type ones. Under suitable assumptions, we establish the
existence of a positive nonradial solution via techniques in the spirit of
Szulkin's nonsmooth critical point theory, applied within a convex cone in
Orlicz spaces. Notably, the Trudinger-Moser inequality fails in the whole
Sobolev space $H^1_0(A)$.

AI.tldr: 在环形区域上研究半线性椭圆方程，通过Orlicz空间中的凸锥方法和非光滑临界点理论，证明了正的非径向解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究环形区域（有界或无界）上半线性椭圆方程的非径向解存在性问题，特别是当Trudinger-Moser不等式在整个Sobolev空间失效时，如何克服这一困难
AI.techniques: Szulkin的非光滑临界点理论，Orlicz空间中的凸锥方法，处理超线性增长非线性项（包括指数型和幂型）
AI.main_theorems: 在适当假设下，建立了正的非径向解的存在性定理，克服了Trudinger-Moser不等式在整个Sobolev空间失效的困难
AI.significance: 扩展了环形区域上椭圆方程解的存在性理论，为处理Trudinger-Moser不等式失效的情况提供了新方法，对Orlicz空间理论和临界点理论有贡献

title: Sharp Strong Convergence in Ideal Flows
summary:
We investigate the strong convergence of weak solutions to the
two-dimensional Quasi-Geostrophic Shallow-Water (QGSW) equation as the inverse
Rossby radius tends to zero. In this limit, we recover the Yudovich solution of
the incompressible Euler equations.
  We prove that the vorticity convergence holds in $L^\infty_t L^p_x$, for any
finite integrability exponent $p<\infty$. This extends to the case $p=\infty$
provided that the initial vorticities are continuous and converge uniformly. We
also discuss the sharpness of this limit by demonstrating that the continuity
assumption on the initial data is necessary for the endpoint convergence in
$L^\infty_{t,x}$.
  The proof of the strong convergence relies on the {\em Extrapolation
Compactness} method, recently introduced by Ars\'enio and the first author to
address similar stability questions for the Euler equations. The approach
begins with establishing the convergence in a lower regularity space, at first.
Then, in a later step, the convergence to Yudovich's vorticity of Euler
equations in Lebesgue spaces comes as a consequence of a careful analysis of
the evanescence of specific high Fourier modes of the QGSW vorticity. A central
challenge arises from the absence of a velocity formulation for QGSW, which we
overcome by employing advanced tools from Littlewood Paley theory in endpoint
settings.
  The sharpness of the convergence in the endpoint $L^\infty_{t,x}$ case is
obtained in the context of vortex patches, drawing insights from key findings
on uniformly rotating and stationary solutions of active scalar equations.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维准地转浅水方程弱解在逆Rossby半径趋于零时强收敛到不可压Euler方程的Yudovich解
AI.motivation: 研究二维准地转浅水方程(QGSW)在逆Rossby半径趋于零时的极限行为，这是地球物理流体动力学中的重要极限过程，旨在理解该方程如何收敛到经典的不可压Euler方程
AI.techniques: 使用外推紧致性方法、Littlewood-Paley理论在端点情形下的高级工具、对QGSW涡度特定高频Fourier模消失的精细分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了涡度在L^∞_t L^p_x空间中的强收敛性(对任意有限p<∞)；在初始涡度连续且一致收敛时，收敛可扩展到p=∞；通过涡旋斑块构造证明了端点L^∞_{t,x}收敛中连续性假设的必要性
AI.significance: 将Arsénio等人的外推紧致性方法扩展到QGSW方程，克服了该方程无速度公式的困难；为地球物理流体中准地转近似到不可压极限的数学理解提供了严格基础；揭示了端点收敛对初始数据连续性的依赖关系

title: Modulated phases in Ising systems with long-range antiferromagnetic and   short-range ferromagnetic interactions
summary:
We consider large spin systems with short-range ferromagnetic interactions
and long-range antiferromagnetic interactions subjected to periodic boundary
conditions which have been proved by Giuliani, Lebowitz and Lieb to have
minimizers that tend to alternate groups of $1$ and $-1$ of the same length
$h^\star$. We consider states with energy of the same order as that of
minimizers and show that they consist of a finite number of modulated phases of
the same form as minimizers with some interfacial defects. The analysis is
carried out using the notation of Gamma-convergence by exhibiting an
interfacial energy that describes the minimal defect energy between different
modulated phases.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有短程铁磁和长程反铁磁相互作用的自旋系统的Gamma收敛理论，描述了能量接近极小值时的状态结构
AI.motivation: 研究由Giuliani、Lebowitz和Lieb提出的具有短程铁磁和长程反铁磁相互作用的周期边界条件自旋系统，该系统已知具有交替排列的极小值态
AI.techniques: 使用Gamma收敛理论，构建界面能量泛函来描述不同调制相之间的缺陷能量，分析能量接近极小值时的状态结构
AI.main_theorems: 证明了能量与极小值同阶的状态由有限个调制相组成，这些相具有与极小值相同的形式但包含界面缺陷，建立了描述不同调制相之间最小缺陷能量的界面能量泛函
AI.significance: 为理解复杂相互作用自旋系统的能量景观提供了严格的数学框架，Gamma收敛方法为研究调制相和界面缺陷提供了系统工具，对统计力学和材料科学中的相变理论有重要意义

title: Global well-posedness for the Navier-Stokes system in new critical   mixed-norm Besov spaces
summary:
In this work, we proved the existence of a unique global mild solution of the
d-dimensional incompressible Navier-Stokes equations, for small initial data in
Besov type spaces based on mixed-Lebesgue spaces; namely, mixed-norm
Besov-Lebesgue spaces and also mixed-norm Fourier-Besov-Lebesgue spaces. The
main tools are the Bernstein's type inequalities, Bony's paraproduct to
estimate the bilinear term and a fixed point scheme in order to get the
well-posedness. Our results complement and cover previous and recents result on
(Fourier-)Besov spaces and, for instance, provide a new class of initial data
possibly not included in BMO^{-1}(R^3) but continuously included in
\dot{B}^{-1}_{\infty,infty}(R^3).

AI.tldr: 证明了d维不可压Navier-Stokes方程在小初值条件下在混合范数Besov-Lebesgue空间中的全局温和解存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究Navier-Stokes方程在小初值条件下的全局适定性问题，特别是在混合范数Besov-Lebesgue空间框架下，这类空间包含了传统Besov空间和Fourier-Besov空间，能够处理更广泛的初值类型
AI.techniques: 使用Bernstein型不等式、Bony的拟积分解估计双线性项、以及不动点方法证明适定性
AI.main_theorems: 在混合范数Besov-Lebesgue空间和混合范数Fourier-Besov-Lebesgue空间中，对于小初值证明了d维不可压Navier-Stokes方程全局温和解的存在唯一性
AI.significance: 推广了Navier-Stokes方程在Besov空间中的适定性理论，提供了包含BMO^{-1}(R^3)但不包含在\dot{B}^{-1}_{\infty,\infty}(R^3)中的新初值类，补充了现有结果

title: A Mixed-FEM approximation with uniform conservation of the exponential   stability for a class of anisotropic port-Hamiltonian system and its   application to LQ control
summary:
In this manuscript, we present a mixed finite element discretization for a
class of boundary-damped anisotropic port-Hamiltonian systems. Using a
multiplier method, we demonstrate that the resulting approximation model
uniformly preserves the exponential stability of the uncontrolled system,
establishing a lower bound for the exponential decay rate that is independent
of the mesh size. This property is illustrated through the spatial
discretization of a piezoelectric beam. Furthermore, we show how the uniform
preservation of exponential stability by the proposed model aids in the
convergence of controllers derived from an infinite-time linear quadratic
control design, in comparison to models obtained from the standard
finite-element method.

AI.tldr: 提出了边界阻尼各向异性端口哈密顿系统的混合有限元离散化方法，证明了离散模型能一致保持原系统的指数稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究边界阻尼各向异性端口哈密顿系统的数值离散化问题，特别是如何设计离散方法能保持原系统的指数稳定性，这对于控制设计和数值模拟至关重要。
AI.techniques: 混合有限元离散化方法、乘子法、指数稳定性分析、线性二次控制设计、与标准有限元方法的比较分析。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了所提出的混合有限元离散化模型能一致保持原系统的指数稳定性，建立了与网格尺寸无关的指数衰减率下界；展示了该方法在压电梁空间离散化中的应用；证明了该方法有助于无限时间线性二次控制设计中控制器的收敛性。
AI.significance: 为端口哈密顿系统的数值离散化提供了能保持稳定性的新方法，对控制系统设计、结构振动分析和能量耗散系统的数值模拟有重要理论意义和应用价值。
